description_long: This is a beaded bracelet composed of alternating turquoise blue and marbled white-pink spherical beads, strung together in a circular arrangement. Each bead is separated by small metallic spacers, adding a subtle metallic accent to the overall design. The bracelet features a prominent metallic charm in the shape of an owl, which hangs from a decorative, textured metal bar. The owl charm is detailed, with visible eyes and feather patterns, and is accompanied by a small round metallic bead. The beads have a smooth, slightly glossy finish, while the metallic components exhibit a matte silver tone. The color palette is dominated by turquoise, white, pink, and silver, giving the bracelet a vibrant yet balanced appearance.
description: A circular bracelet with turquoise and marbled white-pink beads, accented by metallic spacers and an ornate silver owl charm. The design is colorful and moderately detailed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular arrangement of beads and the detailed owl charm hanging at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the alignment of the beads in a straight line, with the owl charm partially visible at the end.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the full bead circle and the owl charm, but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the beads in a straight line, with the owl charm at the bottom end.
